caption: The video features a woman with long dark hair, dressed in a professional black blazer and top, standing confidently with her hands on her hips against a bright, softly lit background. The scene is accompanied by text on the right side of the screen that reads, "That is, until she found out about the Mercatus Center's MA Fellowship from her economics professor and Mercatus PhD alum, Howard Baetjer." This suggests that the video is likely an informational or promotional piece highlighting the impact of the Mercatus Center's MA Fellowship program. The woman appears to be sharing her personal experience or success story related to the fellowship, possibly inspired by her economics professor, Howard Baetjer. The overall tone of the video seems positive and encouraging, aimed at inspiring others to consider the fellowship opportunity.
